# Homina

> Homina is a free, open-source Discord bot for the mobile game **Warhammer 40,000: Tacticus**. It reads a guild's data from the official Tacticus API and turns it into clear, decision-ready charts and readouts for **Guild Raid** analytics — damage, tokens, bombs, participation and multi-season trends. It runs entirely inside Discord via 40+ slash commands.

## About

- **Name:** Homina
- **Type:** Discord bot (Warhammer 40,000: Tacticus guild raid analytics)
- **Cost:** Free and open source
- **Author:** sigubrat — an official Tacticus Player Ambassador and Tool Builder program member
- **Data source:** the official Tacticus public API (player- and guild-scoped API tokens)
- **Affiliation:** A community tool. Not affiliated with or endorsed by Snowprint Studios.

## Getting started

Add the bot to a Discord server, then run `/register` with an API token created by a guild Leader or Co-Leader that has **Guild** and **Raid** scope. A single registration unlocks every command for the whole guild. Most commands default the `season` option to the current season.

## Key links

- [Landing page](https://hominabot.com/): overview of features and example charts
- [Command documentation](https://hominabot.com/commands.html): full reference for all commands
- [Add the bot (Discord app directory)](https://discord.com/discovery/applications/1351837170498801714)
- [Support / community Discord server](https://discord.gg/FajYxuWY9b)
- [Source code on GitHub](https://github.com/sigubrat/Homina)
- [Buy me a coffee](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/homina)
- Friend referral code (permanent, redeem once in-game to support the developer): `HUG-44-CAN`

## Commands

### Getting started
- `/register`: Register your account with a Guild + Raid scoped API token.
- `/test-token`: Test whether your registered API token is still valid.
- `/delete`: Delete your Discord account and API token from the bot.

### Damage & performance
- `/member-stats-per-season`: Detailed per-member stats for a season — total damage, average/max damage-per-token, guild median.
- `/relative-performance`: How each member performs relative to the guild average across all bosses at a rarity.
- `/season-highscore`: Each player's highscore per boss for a season.
- `/best-comps`: The highest-scoring raid team compositions for a season.
- `/prime-specialists`: Who deals the most damage to each prime, using seasons with matching primes.

### Token economy
- `/season-tokens`: Tokens used by each member in a season, with median, standard deviation and estimated availability.
- `/tokens-per-loop`: Tokens the guild spent on each loop in a season.
- `/tokens-per-loop-by-boss`: Tokens spent on each boss per loop in a season.
- `/tokens-burnt`: Tokens each member wasted by hitting the cap this season.
- `/token-history`: A player's token usage over the last N seasons as a line chart.

### Bombs & availability
- `/available-bombs`: Who has bombs ready now, projected bomb damage, boss-kill chances and a copy-paste ping list.
- `/season-bombs`: Bombs used by each member in a season.
- `/gr-availability`: Overview of tokens and bombs each member currently has available.

### Participation & activity
- `/season-participation`: How much each member participated in a season.
- `/inactivity-by-season`: Members who did not use the required number of tokens in a season.
- `/activity-per-hour`: What time of day the guild uses its raid tokens.
- `/gr-time-used`: How long it takes to complete each raid boss in a season.

### Seasons & trends
- `/guild-credits-history`: Credits earned from killing guild bosses over the last N seasons.
- `/loops-history`: Guild raid loops completed over the last N seasons.
- `/gr-damage-history`: Total guild damage dealt over the last N seasons (line chart).
- `/season-by-rarity`: Guild raid stats for each boss at a rarity in a season.
- `/season-bosses`: Guild boss configs for previous seasons.
- `/season-same`: Previous seasons with the same boss config.
- `/meta-team-distribution`: Distribution of meta teams in a season.
- `/achievements`: Fun guild-wide superlatives and awards for a season.
- `/track-member`: Track a single member's raid stats over recent seasons.

### Guild management
- `/player-metadata`: Nicknames and API token status for all guild members.
- `/member-ids`: List of guild members for use in registering usernames.
- `/set-player-nickname`: Set a custom display nickname for a member.
- `/clear-player-nickname`: Remove a custom nickname, restoring the in-game name.
- `/set-player-token`: Register a player-scope API token for a member for precise cooldown data.
- `/clear-player-token`: Remove a player-scope API token, reverting to estimated cooldowns.
- `/invite-user`: Invite a user to register with your API token.
- `/revoke-access`: Revoke access for a previously invited user.

### Utility
- `/help`: Overview of the bot and its commands.
- `/bot-stats`: Statistics about the bot and its performance.
- `/bot-metrics`: Detailed bot usage metrics and trends.
